image.title: NAA Simon, J Huebner, R Berner, APS Munro, M Exner, HI Huppertz, P Walger

item.title: Measures to maintain regular operations and prevent outbreaks of SARS-CoV-2 in childcare facilities or schools under pandemic conditions and co-circulation of other respiratory pathogens.
